publisher.name: StreetLib
publisher.description: This publisher offers the italian book with softcover and eBook and can be ordered from your preferred book store with the ISBN 979-12-224-6182-3. With StreetLib, the FSFE has an affiliate link and gets 42% for the paper book and 72% for the eBook.

publisher.name: Lulu.com
publisher.description: This publisher offers the italian book with hardcover and can be ordered from your preferred book store with the ISBN 979-12-224-6182-3.
